name: github_generate_runner_jitconfig_for_org
description: Generate a just-in-time runner configuration for an organization (POST /orgs/{org}/actions/runners/generate-jitconfig). Provide name, runner_group_id, labels (1-100), optional work_folder (default _work). Classic tokens need admin:org scope. Success is HTTP 201 with runner and encoded_jit_config. See GitHub REST self-hosted runners.
